title: Executive Order 7644—Authorizing Transfer of Certain Employees of the Government-Operated Star Route Service Bureau, Post Office Department, to Positions in the Postal Service
text:
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the provisions of paragraph Eighth of subdivision SECOND of section 2 of the Civil Service Act (22 Stat. 403, 404) it is hereby ordered that, subject to such noncompetitive tests of fitness as the Civil Service Commission may prescribe, the following-named nonclassified employees of the Government-Operated Star Route Service, Bureau of the Second Assistant Postmaster General, who have long been engaged in the operation of certain Star Routes which are again being placed under contract operation, may be transferred and appointed to appropriate classified positions in the Postal Service without regard to the provisions of the Civil Service Act and rules:
Robert S. Belfield
William L. Brent
Harry Charnley
Archie R. Delano
John W. Fincham
O. K. Hale, Jr.
Harry B. Hess
Charles M. King
Richard E. Luce
Harry C. McCleary
Henry L. Naylor
Joseph I. Neal
Warner P. Pitts
James E. Self
Charles S. Thompson
George A. Thompson
William Washington
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
June 24, 1937.
